name: Enabling Agents to Communicate Entirely in Latent Space
summary: arXiv:2511.09149v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: While natural language is the de facto communication medium for LLM-based agents, it presents a fundamental constraint. The process of down...
description: arXiv:2511.09149v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: While natural language is the de facto communication medium for LLM-based agents, it presents a fundamental constraint. The process of downsampling rich, internal latent states into discrete tokens inherently limits the depth and nuance of information that can be transmitted, thereby hindering collaborative problem-solving. author: Zhuoyun Du, Runze Wang, Huiyu Bai, Zouying Cao, Xiaoyong Zhu, Yu Cheng, Bo Zheng, Wei Chen, Haochao Ying
